zh.lifeSummary: Sir William de Percy Sr是Geoffer De Percy和Mrs Geoffer De Percy的兒子，於大約1034年出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯培希--奧勒。他於1066年與Emma de Port在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1096年在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾惠特比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir William de Percy Sr是Geoffer De Percy和Mrs Geoffer De Percy的儿子，于大约1034年出生在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯培希--奧勒。他于1066年与Emma de Port在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1096年在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾惠特比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: Sir William de Percy Sr was born about 1034, in Percy-en-Auge, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France as the son of Geoffer De Percy and Mrs Geoffer De Percy. He married Emma de Port in 1066, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1096, in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, at the age of 63, and was buried in Whitby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir William de Percy Sr est né environ 1034, à Percy-en-Auge, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, fils de Geoffer De Percy et Mrs Geoffer De Percy. Il a épousé Emma de Port en 1066, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1096, à Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israël, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Whitby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1066 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Emma de Port geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1096 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel und wurde in Whitby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Emma de Port nel 1066, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1096, nel Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israele, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Whitby, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Percy Srは約1034年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスペルシ-エン-アウッジでGeoffer De PercyとMrs Geoffer De Percyの息子として生まれた。1066年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでEmma de Portと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1096年にイスラエルמחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִםで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウィトビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Percy Sr(은)는 대략 1034년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 퍼시--오지에서 Geoffer De Percy(와)과 Mrs Geoffer De Percy의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1066년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Emma de Port(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1096년 이스라엘 מחוז ירושלים יְרוּשָׁלַיִם에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 휘트비에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir William de Percy Sr родился около 1034 г. в местности пирси-ен-аудж, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция. Его родителей звали Geoffer De Percy и Mrs Geoffer De Percy. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma de Port в 1066 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1096 г. в местности יְרוּשָׁלַיִם, מחוז ירושלים, Израиль в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности уитби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
